content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY , ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET UNIVERSITY) > DIST- RAYAGADA (ODISHA), PIN-765022 [Establlshed vide Odisha Act-23 of 2018, Included by UGC and Approved AICTE, New Delhi] OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIETU/Exam/2026/ 1A Date: - 19/01/2026 NOTICE In partial modification of the M.Sc (Batch 2025-2027) 1st Semester Regular and M.Sc. (Batch 2024-2026) Supplementary Examination schedule notified vide Notification No. GIETU/Exam/115 & 113 dated 05.01.2026, it is hereby informed that the examination originally scheduled on 23.01.2026 from 02:00 PM to 05:00 PM has been rescheduled to 24.01.2026 from 02:00 PM to 05:00 PM due to “Vasant Panchami” holiday. Other contents of the above Notification remain unchanged. Coordinator/ for information and necessary action. They are requested to inform the Sstudents. GIETU Website/Notice Board. (4 Lf "% Controller of Examinations GIET University
